title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement with Department of Health-center for Health Development (DOH-CHD) - Calabarzon for the Receipt of Grant Incentive Intended for Local Government Units (LGUS) Which Had Outstanding Performance During the Bayanihan Bakunahan (NATIONAL VACCINATION DAY) for the Prevention and Control of Covid-19. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 04/01/22)
